comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 pilot, shape D (dict->f-string url). Transcribed VERBATIM from scraper_buds.py inline CALIBER_FILTER_URLS on 2026-06-14 — the f-strings resolve to absolute URLs; stored here as paths relative to base, parity-proven byte-identical (after relativizing the resolved f-strings against base) before flip. URL-encoding preserved exactly (+ = space, %26 = &, %28/%29 = parens, numeric prefix = Bud's category id); changing it 404s. Only the 6 calibers Bud's exposes a filter URL for are here; the other 4 (380acp, 357mag, 762x39, 300blk) are picked up by the all-ammo crawl backstop, which stays inline (it is NOT a per-caliber URL). Bud's is requests-based (not Playwright); see the scraper for why the Playwright redirect guard does not apply. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 pilot, 2026-06-14. 2026-06-26: added 10mm as a keyword-search q-scoped path (/search.php/type/ammo/q/10mm) — Bud's exposes no 10mm caliber facet and the all-ammo backstop's 1000-cap misses 10mm; harness PASS (200 / no-redirect / title-match / 100% of 36 page-1 cards / 6 pages). Each card is re-tagged by normalize_caliber(title), so the q-scope cannot mistag non-10mm rows. Approved by Jon.

10mm.source: manual: keyword-search q-scope (Bud's exposes no 10mm caliber facet; the all-ammo backstop's 1000-cap misses 10mm)

validation.note: q-scoped keyword category, not a /caliber/<id> facet (none exists for 10mm); page-1 cards parsed via the buds itemprop parser because the generic-requests fetch adapter is card-blind for buds; 36/36 = 100% normalize to 10mm; page <title> '"10mm" in Ammo'; /page/N pagination confirmed through page 6
